nanohub-qe¶

nanohub-qe (import as nanohubqe) is a Python library for Quantum ESPRESSO automation: building input decks, running local/remote workflows, parsing outputs, and plotting results.

Contents

    • Install
    • Create an Input Deck
    • Load Quantum ESPRESSO on nanoHUB
    • Run a Workflow
    • Parse and Plot

    • Configurable UI-like Workflow

    • Package
    • Core Modules
    • Templates and Postprocessing
    • Run Records
